title: Collect and record production data
training_package_name: Agriculture, Horticulture and Conservation and Land Management Training Package
competent_person_statement: A competent person in Collect and record production data demonstrates consistent performance across all elements and performance criteria in a workplace context.

elements.title: Identify production data to be collected

pcs.text: Confirm requirements of data to be collected with supervisor or by reading work instructions

pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Select, fit and use personal protective equipment (PPE) applicable to the task.

pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Identify difficulties that may be encountered in collecting the data, and seek supervisor advice.

pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Communicate advice about the proposed data collection to co-workers as required.
